summary_one_line: Input must encode a recognized 16-bit raster format whose formatters exist, e.g. Lab colorspace signatures replacing the unsupported RGB/XYZ pair.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The profile-header colorspace signature bytes (offsets 0x10-0x16: data colorspace and PCS) must name a colorspace whose 16-bit formatter is registered, so _cmsGetFormatter returns non-NULL FromInput/ToOutput. Winners carry 'Lab Lab' (4c 61 62 / 4c 61 62) where losers carry 'RGB XYZ' (52 47 42 / 58 59 5a), which produces a NULL formatter and takes the false branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds hold 'Lab Lab' at offsets 0x10-0x16 (4c 61 62 20 / 4c 61 62 20), a colorspace whose formatter lookup at line 953-954 returns non-NULL, so line 956 takes the true (blocked) side and resolves it.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds hold 'RGB XYZ' at the same offsets (52 47 42 20 / 58 59 5a 20), whose 16-bit formatter is not satisfied here, leaving FromInput/ToOutput non-NULL so line 956 falls through to the false side (T=0 F=20).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the colorspace-signature comparison in _cmsGetFormatter and log the expected operand into the CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace then scans the input for the present bytes and substitutes the matching constant at offsets 0x10-0x16, manufacturing the 'Lab' signature naive/value_profile cannot reach by blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the NULL-formatter guard reached only in the non-float, non-zero-format branch of AllocEmptyTransform.
FromInput/ToOutput are populated by the 16-bit formatter lookup keyed on InputFormat/OutputFormat just before the guard.
Winner seeds carry the 'Lab Lab' colorspace signature at the format-defining offsets.
Loser seeds carry the 'RGB XYZ' colorspace signature at the same offsets.
Offsets 0x10-0x16 are the concentrated DIFFER offsets separating W (Lab) from L (RGB/XYZ).
The losing seeds never take the true side: at line 956 L shows T=0 F=20 while W resolves it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 956  T=20 F=0  T=0 F=20  if (p ->FromInput == NULL || p ->ToOutput == NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile (the loser of pair 2) lacks I2SRandReplace, isolating I2S as the decisive technique.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2415 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0aedfccd0898c3ff` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -, ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03) at depth 16 of the chain; the tool's trailing signal confirms '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 16', a lower-bound I2S contribution exclusive to cmplog/vpc in the canonical 4-fuzzer set.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating line 956 on a colorspace-signature compare in which cmplog/vpc resolve the branch no faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S dose-response), i.e. naive reaching the true side at the same rate.

weakest_evidence_point: The dash-row I2S signal is a lower bound and the leaf seed's logged mutation_op is havoc-named, so the exact offset 0x10-0x16 substitution is inferred from the byte diff rather than directly from a logged I2SRandReplace operand.
